'''''Obsession'' 5''' is the fifth and final issue of the ''[[Star Wars: Obsession]]'' comic series, released [[May 18]], [[2005]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]], and the final piece of Star Wars media released before [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|Revenge of the Sith]].

==Publisher's summary==
''On the bleak cemetery world of Boz Pity, the Jedi fight what they hope will be a decisive battle against the Separatists. As a team of powerful Jedi take on Count Dooku, Mace Windu goes one-on-one with General Grievous in a spectacular duel that requires both parties to pull out all the stops!''

''But Obi-Wan Kenobi cares for none of this. He is concerned with only a single target—the enemy he has pursued across the galaxy. But Obi-Wan doesn't realize that his greatest triumph might also lead to his greatest failure, and destroy everything that makes him a Jedi and a hero.''

''The exciting conclusion of this story sets the stage for Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith''!''

==Plot summary==
{{Plot|comic}}

==Continuity==
[[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] was originally killed off in ''Obsession'' 5 ([[2005]]), but her death was later overridden by the ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' television series. Her death was instead depicted in the episode "[[Revival (episode)|Revival]]" ([[2012]]).<ref name="Revival">{{TCW|Revival (episode)}}</ref> [[Leland Chee]], the Keeper of the [[Holocron continuity database]], provided confirmation that any parts of the comic relating to her death should be treated as non-[[canon]].<ref name="Chee on Facebook">{{Facebook|noprofile=1|url=permalink.php?story_fbid=470551479632450&id=201820953172172&comment_id=20217958&offset=0&total_comments=1|author=Leland Chee|nobackup=1}}</ref>
